calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order (1) Approving Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting (2) Approving And Ordering Payment Of Fees And Expenses Incurred By Receivership Estate; (3) Approving Compensation To Receiver For Fees And Costs Incurred As A Result Thereof; (4) Instructing Receiver On Disposition Of Proceeds Held By Receiver; And (5) Terminating Receivership, Discharging Receiver From His Duties, And Exonerating Receiver'S Bond
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 18, 2025. Line 4.

OTHER GERARD KEENA , RECEIVER Motion For Order (1) Approving Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting (2) Approving And Ordering Payment Of Fees And Expenses Incurred By Receivership Estate; (3) Approving Compensation To Receiver For Fees And Costs Incurred As A Result Thereof; (4) Instructing Receiver On Disposition Of Proceeds Held By Receiver; And (5) Terminating Receivership, Discharging Receiver From His Duties, And Exonerating Receiver'S Bond;

is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Receiver to prepare an order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Continued To Feb-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
